summary: Clear soundboard‑style capture of Spring ’87 highlighting Garcia’s soaring vocals on “Althea.”
review: The reviewer praises this source as the clearest available for the March 23, 1987 show, noting balanced instrument and vocal levels with a subdued audience presence. Garcia’s voice is singled out as “priceless,” especially on “Althea,” making the musical performance stand out despite limited commentary on the rest of the set.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed, four‑star review highlights both strong musical moments (Garcia’s vocals) and a high‑quality recording, supporting an overall good rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes this source has the clearest instrument/vocal balance and the most subdued audience of available AUDs; other sources sound distant or tinny, making this the preferred capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; focus is on vocal performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia's vocals are described as priceless and in great range during this tour, especially on “Althea.”
